name: Funding Provider Rules
purpose: Private routing and review rules used by API routes only. Do not expose this file to browsers or public static endpoints.

rules.rule: Never expose provider names, affiliate URLs, apply URLs, commissions, contact emails, private notes, or internal routing notes in public files.
Return white-labeled funding paths publicly; provider-specific routing should be sent only to internal review or CRM workflows.
Do not claim approval, guaranteed funding, qualification, underwriting outcome, or final eligibility.
